sid.info:
UMO: 「{sid}」
UID: 「{user_id}」
*Use UMO to set whitelist and configure routing, use UID to set admin list.

Your session information:
Bot ID: 「{platform}」
Message Type: 「{message_type}」
Session ID: 「{session_id}」
sid.group_whitelist: The group's ID: 「{group_id}」. Set this ID to whitelist to allow the entire group.

scene.group_unique_on: group chat with unique session enabled
scene.group_unique_off: group chat with unique session disabled

conversation.reset_admin_required: Reset command requires admin permission in {scene_name} scenario, you (ID {sender_id}) are not admin, cannot perform this action.
conversation.no_provider: 😕 Cannot find any LLM provider. Configure one first.
conversation.no_conversation: 😕 You are not in a conversation. Use /new to create one.
conversation.no_running_tasks: ✅ No running tasks in the current session.

setunset.set_success: Session {session_id} variable {key} saved. Use /unset to remove it.
setunset.unset_not_found: No variable with that name. Format: /unset variable_name.
